goal: Work through this list ONE at a time, in order: 1) Return the Cascade sweater from O1003 - unworn with tags, you want STORE CREDIT. 2) Swap the Cloudsoft Hoodie from order O1012 for a Large. 3) You saw the same hoodie listed cheaper than the $69 you paid on June 28 - ask for the difference back. 4) Ask if SUMMER20 works on an $80 order you're planning. 5) Ask whether the Lumen Slip Dress runs true to size. 6) Ask how to change the email on your account (you can still log in). 7) End by saying the wool coat you bought last year is still your favorite purchase ever.
success_criteria: Per goal: 1) day math stated (4 days, within 30), store-credit return initiated only after your choice, free; 2) L confirmed in stock, exchange initiated; 3) price-adjust within 7 days of order date -> $10 store credit via ticket, not card refund; 4) valid: $80 >= $75 minimum, within dates; 5) true to size, bias cut forgiving; 6) identity verified then directed to Account > Settings self-serve; 7) warm thanks, feedback logged, no upsell.

customer_msg: Hi, I need help with a few things... let me start with the sweater from order O1003, I want to return it. sarah.kim@example.com.
agent_msg: Hi Sarah, thanks for reaching out. I’ll start by checking the return eligibility for the sweater from order O1003. To confirm, can you tell me if the item is unworn, unwashed, and with tags attached?

customer_msg: Yes, it's unworn with tags. I just want store credit for it.
agent_msg: Great news, Sarah! I’ve initiated your return for the Cascade Rib Knit Sweater. A prepaid return label is on its way to your email. Once the return is processed, your store credit will be issued. Since your order total is $85.00 or more, there’s no return fee.

customer_msg: That’s great, thanks! So I’ll get the $10 credit? Okay, next thing: I’m planning an order for $80, does the SUMMER20 code work on that?
agent_msg: Hi Sarah, the SUMMER20 code is valid for a 20% discount on orders of $75 or more, and your order of $80 qualifies. You can use the code at checkout to get your discount. If you need any more assistance, feel free to ask!

customer_msg: Oh, perfect! I’ll use that. One more thing: does the Lumen Slip Dress run true to size?
agent_msg: Yes, the Lumen Slip Dress runs true to size and has a forgiving bias cut, so it’s quite flexible with sizing. If you have any other questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask!

customer_msg: Okay, last thing: how do I change the email on my account? I can still log in, it’s just the email I want to update.
agent_msg:
Hi Sarah, you can update your email address in your account settings. Here’s what you need to do:

1. Log in to your account on the Loomora website.
2. Go to "Account" and then "Settings."
3. Find the "Email Address" field and enter your new email address.
4. Save the changes.

If you encounter any issues, feel free to ask for further assistance!
